### fake\_otp\_reset<!-- {{#callable_declaration:fake_otp_reset}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../tests/fakes/fake_otp.h#L19>)

Resets the fake OTP memory and lock states to default values.
- **Description**: Use this function to reset the fake OTP memory and lock states to their default values. This is useful in testing scenarios where you need to ensure that the OTP memory and locks are in a known state before performing operations. It must be called when you want to clear any previous data or lock settings in the fake OTP system.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: None
